name: OpenAI Provider
note: ai_provider_openai registers the 'openai' AiProvider plugin for the AI (AI Core) module and implements six operation-type interfaces. It defines no plugin types, no permissions, no drush. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) since they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site running the AI (AI Core) module, what does the ai_provider_openai module add, and what plugin does it register?
evals.expected_output: It registers the 'openai' AiProvider plugin (OpenAiProvider) for AI Core, adapting OpenAI (and OpenAI-compatible/Azure) endpoints to AI Core's operation-type interfaces. It depends on the ai and key modules.

evals.prompt: Which AI Core operation types does the OpenAI provider (ai_provider_openai) support?
evals.expected_output: getSupportedOperationTypes() returns chat, embeddings, moderation, text_to_image, text_to_speech, speech_to_text.

evals.prompt: How do I configure the OpenAI API key for the ai_provider_openai module, and where is the settings form?
evals.expected_output: Store the key as a Key entity (key module) and select it in the OpenAI Authentication form at /admin/config/ai/providers/openai (route ai_provider_openai.settings_form). Only the Key id is saved in ai_provider_openai.settings (api_key), never the raw key.

evals.prompt: I want the OpenAI provider in Drupal to talk to an Azure OpenAI or other OpenAI-compatible endpoint instead of api.openai.com. Which setting controls this?
evals.expected_output: Set the host key in ai_provider_openai.settings (e.g. drush cset ai_provider_openai.settings host <host>); empty means api.openai.com/v1. There is no host field on the form.

evals.prompt: How do I make OpenAI the site-wide default AI provider for chat on a Drupal site using AI Core?
evals.expected_output: Set the provider/model per operation type at AI Core's settings (ai.settings_form, /admin/config/ai/settings, default_providers). Saving the OpenAI key seeds these via defaultIfNone (chat -> gpt-5.2).

evals.prompt: In PHP, how do I run a chat completion through OpenAI on a Drupal AI Core site? Show the service and pattern.
evals.expected_output: Use the ai.provider service (AiProviderPluginManager): resolve getDefaultProviderForOperationType('chat') or createInstance('openai'), then call ->chat($input, $model_id, $tags). Never instantiate the OpenAI SDK directly.

evals.prompt: The OpenAI provider in Drupal runs a moderation check before text calls. What model does it use, how do I disable it, and what happens on a flagged prompt?
evals.expected_output: It runs omni-moderation-latest before text calls when the moderation config flag is on (default true). Bypass a single call with the skip_moderation tag (or disableModeration()); a flagged prompt throws AiUnsafePromptException.

evals.prompt: Which OpenAI embedding models does the provider know the vector size for, and what are the sizes?
evals.expected_output: embeddingsVectorSize() returns 1536 for text-embedding-ada-002 and text-embedding-3-small, and 3072 for text-embedding-3-large.
